fixture: 026_update_many_rows

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE numbers (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qty INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (1, 10)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (2, 20)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (3, 30)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    UPDATE numbers SET qty = 99 WHERE id > 1
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 2
